## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## University & Blackboard version
- University: (e.g. Charles Darwin University)
- Blackboard interface: (Ultra / Classic / unsure)
- Blackboard URL: (e.g. https://online.myuni.edu.au)
- SSO provider: (e.g. Microsoft, Shibboleth, Google, unknown)

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `python3 setup.py`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Paste any error output here.

## Environment
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows
- Python version: (`python3 --version`)
- Output of `pip show mcp playwright httpx | grep Version`
